name: Time Offset param and Time Loop Layer - Synfig Forums

name: Time Loop Layer — Synfig User Manual 1.5.1 documentation
snippet: The Time Loop layer is used to repeat an animation over and over. It loops a section of the layers below and within the same canvas over and over.
